hero.title: Social Caption Generator
hero.description: Plan caption projects, draft platform-ready captions, save reusable templates, and track revision history in one owner-scoped workspace.

flow.title: Project → Captions → Templates → History
steps: Create a caption project with platform, audience, tone, and campaign brief.
Draft and refine social captions tied to the project.
Capture reusable caption templates and keep revision history connected to each caption.

differences.title: Keep social caption work organized by campaign
differences.description: Social Caption Generator separates project context, caption outputs, reusable templates, and revision history so users can manage caption work without bloated list payloads.

items.title: Project context
items.description: Each project stores the audience, platform, tone, brief, and notes that guide caption work.

items.title: Caption drafting
items.description: Captions carry editable text, hashtags, calls to action, status, and parent project ownership.

items.title: Reusable memory
items.description: Templates and history records preserve reusable formats and revision context without mixing them into caption lists.

feel.title: A practical workspace for repeated caption writing
feel.description: The app keeps high-volume caption work structured, editable, and easy to scan.

items.title: Start with the campaign
items.description: Define the project once, then attach captions and templates to that context.

items.title: Review caption output
items.description: Use detail records for full text while lists stay lightweight for fast scanning.

items.title: Preserve reusable pieces
items.description: Templates and history support repeated workflows without becoming global shell features.

audiences.title: Who uses Social Caption Generator
audiences.description: Built for users who repeatedly create captions for campaigns, posts, and platform-specific social content.

items.title: Creators
items.description: Draft captions and hashtags for upcoming posts.

items.title: Marketers
items.description: Keep campaign captions, reusable structures, and revisions connected.

items.title: Small businesses
items.description: Manage caption work without needing a full marketing operations tool.

resourceSection.title: Caption workspace essentials
resourceSection.description: The workflow keeps long-lived records editable while history remains scoped to caption activity.

items.title: Projects
items.description: Store the campaign brief and target platform context.

items.title: Captions
items.description: Hold generated or manually refined caption text, hashtags, and calls to action.

items.title: Templates and history
items.description: Capture reusable wording patterns and track generation or edit events.

groupedSection.title: Build a social caption library
groupedSection.description: Move from campaign context toward reusable caption output.

items.name: Audience
items.description: Clarify who the caption is written for.

items.name: Tone
items.description: Set the voice used across related captions.

items.name: Caption
items.description: Save editable caption text with hashtags and CTA.

items.name: Template
items.description: Capture reusable structures for future posts.

technicalSection.title: Designed for the platform foundation
technicalSection.description: Social Caption Generator follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture and User API Response Contract.
items: Lightweight dashboard and list responses with detail endpoints for editable records.
Protected workflow pages under /social-caption-generator/projects, captions, templates, and history.

finalCta.title: Explore social caption work
finalCta.description: Open the projects workflow to start organizing social caption generation.
